## Summary

- Describe the user-visible change and the risk it addresses.

## Verification

- [ ] `./test.sh`
- [ ] `./build.sh --clean`
- [ ] Packaging smoke test from `docs/manual-qa.md`, or not applicable
- [ ] `OST.zip` SHA-256 recorded for packaging changes, or not applicable

## Manual QA

- [ ] Required for this change and completed using `docs/manual-qa.md`
- [ ] Manual QA evidence attached or linked, or not applicable
- [ ] Not applicable because this change does not affect capture, speech, translation, overlay, settings, session history, packaging, or permissions

## Privacy / Data Flow

- [ ] Reviewed for online fallback or other external data transfer changes, or not applicable
